problems.diagnostic: Assume statements are allowed only in component types
problems.cause: AGREE annex is placed in system implementation instead of system type
problems.minimal_edit: Move the annex agree block from ADIRU.impl to ADIRU

problems.diagnostic: left side of binary expression '=>' is of type 'int' but must be of type 'bool'
problems.cause: Port references used in boolean implication without proper AGREE expression syntax
problems.minimal_edit: Replace port references with valid AGREE boolean expressions using '->' or equivalent

problems.diagnostic: left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type 'partitions::acc_process.impl' and 'partitions::acc_partition.impl', but must be of the same type
problems.cause: Type mismatch in equality expressions between process and partition types
problems.minimal_edit: Remove or rewrite binding assumptions to use valid component references

problems.cause: Reference to undefined component 'main_cpu' in property assignments
problems.minimal_edit: Remove or rewrite property assignments that reference undefined components

problems.diagnostic: Property Deployment_Properties::Actual_Processor_Binding does not apply to ADIRU
problems.cause: Property applied to wrong component type
problems.minimal_edit: Move property assignments to appropriate component implementation scope

problems.diagnostic: The referenced property set 'Deployment_Properties' of property 'Actual_Processor_Binding' is not listed in a with clause
problems.cause: Missing with clause for property set
problems.minimal_edit: Add 'with Deployment_Properties;' to the package declaration

executor_steps: Add 'with Deployment_Properties;' to the package ADIRU declaration
Move the annex agree block from ADIRU.impl to ADIRU system type
Replace port references in assume statements with valid AGREE boolean expressions
Remove or rewrite binding assumptions that compare incompatible types
Move property assignments to appropriate component implementation scope
Remove or fix property assignments that reference undefined components
